Actually, earlier I found that clicking on the target's center when it's white (W) doesn't work. But clicking on it when it's charcoal (c) does work. So the condition is: the clicked pixel must NOT be white.
Now, the left charcoal frame's interior reverted to light gray (w) when the player moved out of it. This means the charcoal frame's interior only changes when the player is inside it.
So the game mechanic is:

2. The frame's interior fills with the player's frame color (green)
